titleStmt.title: SII 26.413: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 413. (A.R. No. 392 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in, in the middle.

It records a gift of 25 kaḻañju of poṉ to provide for festival and a nandā lamp to the image of god Āḍavallār set up in the temple of god [••• •••••]pagavar evidently of Śiṟṟiṅgūr in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by a certain Āḍavallāṉ. The gift was made by the Brāhmaṇi Kāḷi-Sōmāśi, wife of Ātrayan Kēsuvaṉ Māṟaṉ of the same village. It was accepted by the temple managers on the Tiruvādirai day of the month of Mārgaḻi.

It also records a gift by the same donor of some land situated in Śirupāganallūr in the western hamlet of the village and near the tank called the Śrīrājarājapērēri for offerings to the god of the main shrine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . rājakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu malāṭaāṉa jaṉanātavaḷa nāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu bra
pakavar Āṭavallāṉ Eḻun=taruḷivikkiṟiniṟa Āṭṭavallākkut tiriviḻākkum tiru nan=tāviḷakkum ceyakkuṭutta nibaṇḍamāvatu Ivvūr śrīkoyiluṭaiyārkaḷ mārkaḻi māsattu tiruvātiraināḷ samamaṟasam Ivvūr Ātrayana kecuvaṉ māṟaṉ brāhmaṇi kāḷi comāci pakkal koṇṭa poṉ Irupatañkaḻaiñcukkum palicaiyāka Arici Eḻukalaney Eḻukuṟuṇiyum ney Eṇṇai Irutūṇiyum Ivvūr melpiṭākai ciṟupākanallūr śrīrājarāja- pererik
m śrīarumoḻidevaṉ vāykkālukku teṟkukaṇattā nāṉa peṟuñceṟu nilam Aiñcumāvum
sūyyadevapperuñceṟuvu nilam nālumāvum kaḷvaṉ vāykkālukkut tekku kaṇavatiyāna ceṟu muṉṟum
[mu ṭil muṭiviṉ] viḷakku Oṉṟukku tiruppuvip pakavan nāḻiyāle Eḻunāḻi Arici Aṉṟāṭu koyiṟṟamuṉukku miṉṟiyaḷappikka kaṭavārkaḷāka sammatittom Ik
ivvūrpāṟ teṉpiṭākai koṭiyūr Erikiḻ Āṭavallāṉ peruñceṟu nilam Eṭṭumāvum Iṉnilamum Ivvariciyum koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉ Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.413 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
